title: Coleman (disambiguation)
content:
'''Coleman''' could refer to:

==Canon==
*'''[[Coleman Trebor]]''', a [[Jedi High Council]] member.
*'''[[Coleman Kcaj]]''', an [[Ongree]] Jedi Council member.

==Legends==
*'''[[Coleman Trebor/Legends|Coleman Trebor]]''', a [[Vurk/Legends|Vurk]] [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi Council]] member.
*'''[[Coleman Kcaj/Legends|Coleman Kcaj]]''', an [[Ongree/Legends|Ongree]] Jedi Council member.

==Out-of-universe==
*[[Rob Coleman]], an [[Industrial Light & Magic]] staffer and director for several ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars]]'' episodes.

{{Disambig}}
